body.title: context-load resolves UU_ROOT from any cwd + reads fs store (no palace DB)
body.intention: I intend that context-load surfaces decisions/memory from the filesystem store regardless of cwd, with no palace DB.
body.description:
**Problem:** the context-load `run` executor was already migrated to read the filesystem store, but (1) it defaulted `UU_ROOT` to cwd (`.`), so Steps 2a/2b/3 (decisions, memory map) SILENTLY no-op'd whenever cwd != repo root — e.g. post-compact, the first thing run; (2) decisions were sorted by filename glob (alphabetical by D-slug) so 'recent' wasn't recent; (3) Step 3 showed `kind` ('decision') instead of real status; (4) SKILL.md still documented the retired psql/memory_palace/adc.palace palace steps + nonexistent `python run` subcommands. **Shape:** resolve `UU_ROOT` via `uu_root()` (env-first, then package __file__ chain); sort decisions by `emitted_at` desc; Step 3 shows `body.status`; rewrite SKILL.md to describe the one-command fs-store executor. **Affected files:** skills/context-load/run, skills/context-load/SKILL.md, tests/test_context_load_reads_fs_store.py. **Design rules:** filesystem store canonical; UU_ROOT via uu_root() (CLAUDE.md). **Scope boundary:** IN — context-load (run + doc). OUT — the other 7 survivor skills (parent T-skills-palace-db-to-fs-store); the pre-existing violation_summary failure (T-context-load-violation-summary-missing). **Test plan:** run the briefing from a non-root tmp cwd with UU_ROOT unset, assert recent decisions surface WITH status (red before: cwd default dropped them); guard that run + SKILL.md invoke no palace DB. **Completion criteria:** context-load surfaces recent decisions from any cwd; no palace-DB invocation in run or SKILL.md.

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] No TheIgors imports. UnseenUniversity must be portable without TheIgors present. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] datacenter_logs/<device>/<subsystem>/ is the log hierarchy. Never write to a flat — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] PATTERN-001: BaseDevice / BaseShim Lifecycle: `rollback()` must be idempotent — safe to call even if — applies: tags: pattern, pattern-001 (source: docs/design_patterns_inventory.md#PATTERN-001: BaseDevice / BaseShim Lifecycle)
…and 38 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
body.result: context-load resolves UU_ROOT via uu_root() (works from any cwd), sorts decisions by emitted_at, Step 3 shows real status, SKILL.md rewritten to the fs-store executor. Proof: run from non-root cwd surfaces recent decisions with status.
